name: MobileNet
fullName: MobileNets: Efficient Convolutional Neural Networks for Mobile Vision Applications
description: Introduces depthwise separable convolutions to create lightweight models. Designed for mobile and embedded vision applications with minimal computational overhead.

educationalNote.summary: Retinal layer receiving raw RGB pixel matrices.
educationalNote.detailed: Accepts normalized three-channel RGB images of size 224x224. This spatial standardization ensures weight compatibility in subsequent layers.
educationalNote.whyItMatters: Establishes spatial dimensions for the network.
educationalNote.keyTakeaway: Fixed input sizes are critical to prevent spatial alignment errors.

calculationSteps.label: Kernel Weights
calculationSteps.explanation: 32 convolutional filters of size 3x3 convolving over 3 RGB channels. Stride 2 downsamples output to 112x112.

educationalNote.summary: Standard early 3x3 convolution to downsample inputs.
educationalNote.detailed: Captures initial visual patterns like lines and edges. Stride of 2 halves resolution to reduce downstream processing.
educationalNote.whyItMatters: Early spatial reduction saves computation in deeper stages.
educationalNote.keyTakeaway: Early layers capture general visual contours.

calculationSteps.label: Trainable Parameters (gamma, beta)
calculationSteps.explanation: Scale parameter (gamma) and shift parameter (beta) for active channel scaling.

calculationSteps.label: Non-trainable Parameters (mean, variance)
calculationSteps.explanation: Running mean and running variance tracked during training to normalize inference inputs.

educationalNote.detailed: Normalizes activations to stabilize learning.
educationalNote.whyItMatters: Prevents vanishing gradients.

educationalNote.detailed: Capping values to 6 prevents numerical overflow and is optimal for fixed-point integer quantization on edge hardware.
educationalNote.whyItMatters: Essential for deployment on low-precision microcontrollers and mobile processors.
educationalNote.keyTakeaway: Capped activations prevent precision loss during quantization.

calculationSteps.label: Depthwise weights
calculationSteps.explanation: Applies one independent 3x3 filter per channel, separating spatial convolutions from channel mixing.

educationalNote.detailed: Operates spatial convolving over each of the 32 channels separately. Cuts down computing weights by 90% compared to standard convolutions.
educationalNote.whyItMatters: The core mechanism behind MobileNet's fast runtime and low parameter size.
educationalNote.keyTakeaway: Depthwise convolutions perform spatial filtering without mixing channels.

calculationSteps.label: Trainable Parameters (gamma, beta)
calculationSteps.explanation: Scale parameter (gamma) and shift parameter (beta) for active channel scaling.

calculationSteps.label: Non-trainable Parameters (mean, variance)
calculationSteps.explanation: Running mean and running variance tracked during training to normalize inference inputs.

educationalNote.detailed: Stabilizes the activation scale before non-linear gating.
educationalNote.whyItMatters: Enables faster and more robust gradient updates.

educationalNote.summary: Applies ReLU6 activation to depthwise outputs.
educationalNote.detailed: Calculates f(x) = min(max(0, x), 6) element-wise.
educationalNote.whyItMatters: Controls numerical ranges for embedded hardware.

calculationSteps.label: Pointwise weights
calculationSteps.explanation: Combines spatial activations across channels.

educationalNote.detailed: Performs linear combinations over the spatial outputs to project channels from 32 to 64.
educationalNote.whyItMatters: Handles the cross-channel feature integration step in depthwise-separable conv blocks.

calculationSteps.label: Trainable Parameters (gamma, beta)
calculationSteps.explanation: Scale parameter (gamma) and shift parameter (beta) for active channel scaling.

calculationSteps.label: Non-trainable Parameters (mean, variance)
calculationSteps.explanation: Running mean and running variance tracked during training to normalize inference inputs.

educationalNote.detailed: Normalizes the mixed representation before activation.
educationalNote.whyItMatters: Prepares activations for representation matching.

educationalNote.summary: Applies ReLU6 activation to pointwise outputs.
educationalNote.detailed: Computes rectified output limited to 6.
educationalNote.whyItMatters: Final non-linear gating of block output.

calculationSteps.label: Depthwise weights
calculationSteps.explanation: Applies one independent 3x3 filter per channel, separating spatial convolutions from channel mixing.

educationalNote.whyItMatters: The core mechanism behind MobileNet's fast runtime and low parameter size.
educationalNote.keyTakeaway: Depthwise convolutions perform spatial filtering without mixing channels.

educationalNote.detailed: Computes rectified output limited to 6.
educationalNote.whyItMatters: Final non-linear gating of block output.

educationalNote.detailed: Averages spatial dimensions (7x7) to form a global feature vector.
educationalNote.whyItMatters: Avoids parameter bloat associated with flattening.
educationalNote.keyTakeaway: Replaces heavy fully connected layers with zero parameters.

calculationSteps.label: Weights
calculationSteps.explanation: Fully connected mapping weights.

calculationSteps.label: Biases
calculationSteps.explanation: One learnable bias parameter per output class.

educationalNote.summary: Computes probabilities for the 1,000 target classes.
educationalNote.detailed: Uses softmax activation function to compute class probabilities.
educationalNote.whyItMatters: Converts numerical logits into values that sum to 1.

groups.name: Depthwise Separable Block 1
groups.description: Separates spatial filtering from channel mixing: 3x3 dwconv (32 ch) -> 1x1 pwconv (64 ch).

groups.description: Separates spatial filtering from channel mixing: 3x3 dwconv (64 ch) -> 1x1 pwconv (128 ch).

groups.name: Global Pooling & Classification
groups.description: GAP followed by the dense prediction head.
